text: The LORD gave, and the LORD hath taken away; blessed be the name of the LORD.

gcb.mirror: Worship reveals whether faith depends on blessing or on God Himself.
gcb.water: Suffering strips life down to what is most true.
gcb.fire: Loss tests whether the soul will still bless the Lord.

text: For I know that my redeemer liveth.

gcb.mirror: Hope persists even when circumstances collapse.

text: The LORD is my shepherd; I shall not want.

gcb.mirror: The soul is safest when it knows who shepherds it.
gcb.water: Divine care orders the path of life.
gcb.fire: Trust is refined in the valleys the Shepherd permits.

text: Create in me a clean heart, O God; and renew a right spirit within me.

gcb.mirror: Repentance begins with the truth about the heart.
gcb.water: Renewal is an inward cleansing before it is an outward reform.
gcb.fire: The prayer for cleansing burns away self-deception.

text: The fear of the LORD is the beginning of knowledge.

gcb.water: Reverence orders the mind toward truth.
gcb.fire: Holy fear burns away false confidence.

text: Trust in the LORD with all thine heart; and lean not unto thine own understanding.

gcb.mirror: The heart must choose whether it will lean on God or self.
gcb.water: Trust reorders understanding under divine guidance.
gcb.fire: Reliance on God exposes the weakness of self-rule.

text: Vanity of vanities, saith the Preacher, vanity of vanities; all is vanity.

gcb.mirror: Life without eternal anchoring reveals its vapor-like instability.
gcb.water: Vanity washes away illusions of permanence.
gcb.fire: Meaning is tested when earthly gain proves temporary.

text: Fear God, and keep his commandments: for this is the whole duty of man.

gcb.mirror: Meaning is found in right relation to God.
gcb.water: Obedience orders life in a world of passing things.
gcb.fire: The final word burns through endless speculation.

text: Many waters cannot quench love, neither can the floods drown it.

gcb.mirror: True love reveals what cannot be extinguished by pressure.
gcb.water: Love remains through floods that would wash lesser things away.
gcb.fire: Covenant love is tested and proven by endurance.
